title: Investment Firm Builds New $70.7 Million Position in Bank Stock, According to Recent SEC Filing
author: Jake Lerch
description: Channing Capital Management acquired 939,667 shares of Independent Bank Corp (INDB) in a $73.65 million transaction during Q1 2026. The position, valued at $70.67 million at quarter-end, represents 1.81% of the fund's assets. INDB has delivered solid returns matching the S&P 500 over three years, recently reported better-than-expected earnings, approved a $200 million buyback, and offers a 3.4% dividend yield.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong fundamentals with better-than-expected earnings, approved a substantial $200 million share buyback program, offers an attractive 3.31-3.4% dividend yield, and has delivered solid three-year returns (89% CAGR of 23.6%) matching the S&P 500. The institutional investment by Channing Capital further validates the stock's appeal.

title: Moody Aldrich Dumps Entire Stake in Chart Industries Worth $5.8 Million
author: Adam Palasciano
description: Moody Aldrich Partners LLC completely sold its entire 35,228 share position in Chart Industries, valued at approximately $5.8 million, reducing its reportable assets to zero in Q3 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock underperformed S&P 500 by 9.8 percentage points YTD, but remains strategically positioned in clean energy infrastructure with diverse revenue streams

title: Moody Aldrich Liquidates Entire Stake in PLMR Worth $8.2 Million
author: Adam Palasciano
description: Moody Aldrich Partners LLC completely sold its entire 53,211 share position in Palomar Holdings for an estimated $8.21 million during Q3 2025, reducing its stake to zero, likely as part of routine portfolio rebalancing.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock is up 9.2% YTD but underperforming S&P 500; fund exit appears to be tactical portfolio management rather than a negative judgment of company fundamentals

title: Independent Bank Corp. (INDB) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: The headline numbers for Independent Bank Corp. (INDB) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2024, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Independent Bank Corp. (INDB) Lags Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Independent Bank Corp. (INDB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.61% and 2.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
